```json
    "/ws/subscribe": {
      "get": {
        "tags": [
          "WebSocket"
        ],
        "summary": "Real-time Subscription (WebSocket)",
        "description": "## Real-time Data Subscription (WebSocket)\n\n**URL:** `wss://mmapi.55-tech.com/ws/subscribe`\n\n**Connection Limits:** Maximum 5 concurrent connections per API key.\n\n### Protocol\n\n1. **Connect** to `/ws/subscribe`\n\n2. **Subscribe** (within 30 seconds):\n```json\n{\n  \"type\": \"subscribe\",\n  \"api_key\": \"your-client-api-key-uuid\",\n  \"channels\": [\"orders\", \"bets\", \"accounts\", \"scores\", \"emergency\"]\n}\n```\n\n3. **Confirmation**:\n```json\n{\"type\": \"subscribed\", \"subscription_id\": 1, \"channels\": [\"orders\", \"bets\"]}\n```\n\n4. **Receive broadcasts**:\n```json\n{\n  \"type\": \"broadcast\",\n  \"channel\": \"orders\",\n  \"event\": \"UPDATE\",\n  \"payload\": {\"id\": 123, \"orderStatus\": \"FILLED\"},\n  \"old\": {\"orderStatus\": \"PLACED\"}\n}\n```\n\n5. **Keep-alive**: Send `{\"type\": \"ping\"}` \u2192 Receive `{\"type\": \"pong\"}`\n\n6. **Heartbeat**: Server sends `{\"type\": \"heartbeat\"}` every 60s\n\n7. **Unsubscribe**: Send `{\"type\": \"unsubscribe\"}`\n\n### Channels\n\n| Channel | Description | Filtered |\n|---------|-------------|----------|\n| `orders` | Order placement, updates, fills | By client |\n| `bets` | Hedge bet updates | By client |\n| `accounts` | Balance changes | By client |\n| `scores` | Live score updates | Global |\n| `emergency` | Emergency mode status | Global |\n\n### Error Codes\n\n- `api_key required` - Missing api_key\n- `Invalid api_key format` - Must be UUID\n- `Invalid API key` - Not found or inactive\n- `Connection limit exceeded` - Max 5 per API key",
        "operationId": "websocket_subscribe_docs_ws_subscribe_get",
        "responses": {
          "200": {
            "description": "Returns 426 - use WebSocket connection instead",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "schema": {}
              }
            }
          },
          "426": {
            "description": "Upgrade Required - Connect via WebSocket",
            "content": {
              "application/json": {
                "example": {
                  "detail": "This endpoint requires a WebSocket connection. Use wss://mmapi.55-tech.com/ws/subscribe"
                }
              }
            }
          }
        }
      }
    }
  },
  "components": {
    "schemas": {
      "BetSummary": {
        "properties": {
          "total_bets": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Bets",
            "description": "Total number of bets"
          },
          "order_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Order Count",
            "description": "Number of unique orders"
          },
          "bookmaker_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Bookmaker Count",
            "description": "Number of unique bookmakers"
          },
          "total_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Stake",
            "description": "Sum of all bet stakes"
          },
          "avg_price": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "number"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "Avg Price",
            "description": "Average bet price"
          },
          "placed_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Placed Count",
            "description": "Number of placed bets"
          },
          "pending_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Pending Count",
            "description": "Number of pending bets"
          },
          "declined_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Declined Count",
            "description": "Number of declined bets"
          },
          "won_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Won Count",
            "description": "Number of won bets"
          },
          "lost_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Lost Count",
            "description": "Number of lost bets"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "total_bets",
          "order_count",
          "bookmaker_count",
          "total_stake",
          "avg_price",
          "placed_count",
          "pending_count",
          "declined_count",
          "won_count",
          "lost_count"
        ],
        "title": "BetSummary",
        "description": "Summary of bet statistics for a client."
      },
      "ClientInfo": {
        "properties": {
          "client": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Client",
            "description": "Client identifier (e.g., 'demo', 'pinnacle')"
          },
          "clientName": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Clientname",
            "description": "Client display name (e.g., 'Demo', 'Pinnacle')"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "client",
          "clientName"
        ],
        "title": "ClientInfo",
        "description": "Client information from API key lookup."
      },
      "HTTPValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "detail": {
            "items": {
              "$ref": "#/components/schemas/ValidationError"
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Detail"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "title": "HTTPValidationError"
      },
      "OrderSummary": {
        "properties": {
          "total_orders": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Orders",
            "description": "Total number of orders"
          },
          "fixture_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Fixture Count",
            "description": "Number of unique fixtures"
          },
          "exchange_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Exchange Count",
            "description": "Number of unique exchanges"
          },
          "total_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Stake",
            "description": "Sum of all order stakes"
          },
          "total_matched": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Matched",
            "description": "Sum of all matched stakes"
          },
          "total_open": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Open",
            "description": "Sum of open (unmatched) stakes"
          },
          "filled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Filled Count",
            "description": "Number of filled orders"
          },
          "cancelled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Cancelled Count",
            "description": "Number of cancelled orders"
          },
          "open_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Open Count",
            "description": "Number of open orders"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "total_orders",
          "fixture_count",
          "exchange_count",
          "total_stake",
          "total_matched",
          "total_open",
          "filled_count",
          "cancelled_count",
          "open_count"
        ],
        "title": "OrderSummary",
        "description": "Summary of order statistics for a client."
      },
      "PaginatedResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "data": {
            "items": {},
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Data",
            "description": "List of items for current page"
          },
          "total": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total",
            "description": "Total number of items across all pages"
          },
          "page": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Page",
            "description": "Current page number (1-indexed)"
          },
          "page_size": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Page Size",
            "description": "Number of items per page"
          },
          "total_pages": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Total Pages",
            "description": "Total number of pages"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "data",
          "total",
          "page",
          "page_size",
          "total_pages"
        ],
        "title": "PaginatedResponse",
        "description": "Paginated response wrapper for list endpoints."
      },
      "PnLResponse": {
        "properties": {
          "pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Pnl",
            "description": "Total PnL (realized + unrealized)"
          },
          "realized_pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Realized Pnl",
            "description": "PnL from settled orders"
          },
          "unrealized_pnl": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Unrealized Pnl",
            "description": "Potential PnL from open positions"
          },
          "total_matched_stake": {
            "type": "number",
            "title": "Total Matched Stake",
            "description": "Total matched stake"
          },
          "settled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Settled Count",
            "description": "Number of settled orders"
          },
          "unsettled_count": {
            "type": "integer",
            "title": "Unsettled Count",
            "description": "Number of unsettled orders with matches"
          },
          "from_date": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "format": "date"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "From Date",
            "description": "Start date filter (if applied)"
          },
          "to_date": {
            "anyOf": [
              {
                "type": "string",
                "format": "date"
              },
              {
                "type": "null"
              }
            ],
            "title": "To Date",
            "description": "End date filter (if applied)"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "pnl",
          "realized_pnl",
          "unrealized_pnl",
          "total_matched_stake",
          "settled_count",
          "unsettled_count",
          "from_date",
          "to_date"
        ],
        "title": "PnLResponse",
        "description": "Profit and Loss response for a client."
      },
      "ValidationError": {
        "properties": {
          "loc": {
            "items": {
              "anyOf": [
                {
                  "type": "string"
                },
                {
                  "type": "integer"
                }
              ]
            },
            "type": "array",
            "title": "Location"
          },
          "msg": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Message"
          },
          "type": {
            "type": "string",
            "title": "Error Type"
          },
          "input": {
            "title": "Input"
          },
          "ctx": {
            "type": "object",
            "title": "Context"
          }
        },
        "type": "object",
        "required": [
          "loc",
          "msg",
          "type"
        ],
        "title": "ValidationError"
      }
    },
    "securitySchemes": {
      "ApiKeyAuth": {
        "type": "apiKey",
        "in": "header",
        "name": "X-API-Key",
        "description": "Client API key (UUID format). Contact support@55-tech.com to obtain your key."
      }
    }
  },
  "tags": [
    {
      "name": "Client API",
      "description": "Endpoints for trading clients to access orders, bets, fixtures, and positions. Requires `X-API-Key` header authentication."
    },
    {
      "name": "WebSocket",
      "description": "Real-time data subscriptions for orders, bets, accounts, and scores."
    }
  ]
}
```
